Scenario: doctor-config-diagnostics
Pantheon command output
Command: /pantheon-doctor
Status: error
Summary: Pantheon doctor found issues

Output:
Pantheon doctor report

Workspace: <PROJECT_DIR>
Config diagnostics: 3 (1 errors, 2 warnings)
Adapter health checks: 7 (2 attention needed)
Background task dir: ready — <BACKGROUND_DIR>
Debug dir: ready — <DEBUG_DIR>
Workflow state file: not yet created — <WORKFLOW_STATE>
tmux available: <detected>
inside tmux: <detected>
Known background tasks: 0

Checks:
- Config: error
- Adapters: warning
- Multiplexer: warning
- Background storage: ok
- Debug artifacts: ok

Config diagnostics:
- [warning] config.mystery (<PROJECT_DIR>/.pi/oh-my-opencode-pi.jsonc) — Unknown config key; it will be ignored by Pantheon.
- [warning] config.$schema (<PROJECT_DIR>/.pi/oh-my-opencode-pi.jsonc) — Schema not found: <PROJECT_DIR>/missing-schema.json
- [error] multiplexer.layout (<PROJECT_DIR>/.pi/oh-my-opencode-pi.jsonc) — Expected one of: tiled, even-horizontal, even-vertical, main-horizontal, main-vertical.

Adapter health:
- docs-context7 [ok] auth=not-required — Docs resolution is available without extra authentication.
- local-docs [ok] auth=not-required — Repository-local docs are available for fast lookup.
- grep-app [ok] auth=not-required — Public code-search fallback is available.
- github-releases [warn] auth=missing — GitHub token not configured; release lookup may be rate-limited.
- github-code-search [warn] auth=missing — GitHub token not configured; code search may be rate-limited.
- npm-registry [ok] auth=not-required — npm metadata and README lookup is available.
- web-search [ok] auth=not-required — Generic web-search fallback is available.

Suggested next steps:
- Fix config errors first, then rerun /pantheon-doctor.
- Review /pantheon-config for merged config details and warning context.
- Start pi inside tmux to use /pantheon-attach and shared background panes.
- Run /pantheon-adapter-health for focused adapter readiness details.
